items.title_zh: 我的女儿们一直在偷偷追踪我的位置，而我对此毫不知情。其实她们关心我的行踪，这让我松了口气。

items.title: Anthropic says Claude's free active users grew 60%+ and daily signups grew 4x since the start of the year, with Monday being its strongest day ever (Shirin Ghaffary/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Anthropic says Claude's free active users grew 60%+ and daily signups grew 4x since the start of the year, with Monday being its strongest day ever (Shirin Ghaffary/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: Anthropic 表示，自今年年初以来，Claude 的免费活跃用户增长了 60% 以上，每日注册量增长了 4 倍，其中周一是有史以来最强劲的一天（Shirin Ghaffary/彭博社）
